title: Fixing Incorrect Type Inference for a Simple Function

statement.markdown: You are given a simple TypeScript function that calculates the area of a rectangle. However, it contains a logical bug. The bug is in the function body where the area is calculated using the formula `length * width`, but the types are not correctly inferred. Your task is to fix the type inference for this function so that it correctly calculates the area and returns the result as a number.
statement.inputFormat: The function takes two parameters: `length` and `width`, both of which are numbers.
statement.outputFormat: The function returns a number representing the area of the rectangle.
statement.notes: You should modify the function body to correctly calculate the area and return the result as a number.

constraints.description: The length and width of the rectangle are both integers between 1 and 10000.

examples.explanation: The area of a rectangle with length 5 and width 3 is 15.

hints.text: Check the function body to see where the type inference is going wrong.

editorial.title: Fixing Type Inference for the Simple Function
editorial.intuition: The type inference is going wrong because the types of the length and width parameters are not correctly inferred.
editorial.bruteForce: One possible approach is to manually specify the types of the length and width parameters using the `number` type.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use the `number` type for the length and width parameters and calculate the area using the correct formula.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The corrected function will correctly calculate the area and return the result as a number.

starterCode.javascript:
// Define a function calculateArea that takes two parameters: length and width
// and returns the area of the rectangle.
starterCode.python: // Define a function calculateArea(self) that takes no parameters and returns the area of the rectangle.

functionSignature.javascript: function calculateArea(length: any, width: any): any
functionSignature.python: def calculateArea(self, length: any, width: any) -> any:
